title: FC United fights for a top-8 spot
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Despite being out of form,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Despite being out of form, 2025 Safa Eden Presidential Cup title winner FC United defeated the George-based Simunye 1-0 in a regional league fixture at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George on Saturday 29 March.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Despite being out of form, 2025 Safa Eden Presidential Cup title winner FC United defeated the George-based Simunye 1-0 in a regional league fixture at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George on Saturday 29 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Knysna team had a slow start to the 2024/25 season, dropping crucial points. With five games remaining, they are struggling to reach the top eight positions, while Simunye, from George, are fighting for the top five.","html":"The Knysna team had a slow start to the 2024/25 season, dropping crucial points. With five games remaining, they are struggling to reach the top eight positions, while Simunye, from George, are fighting for the top five."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC United kicked off and built their moves using their speedy left winger. Simunye fought hard to score, but several attempts at the goal came to nothing.","html":"FC United kicked off and built their moves using their speedy left winger. Simunye fought hard to score, but several attempts at the goal came to nothing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A foul by Simunye led to a goal for FC United scored by Siyamthanda Lukasi, making the score 1-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half had some fine moments with skilful ball-handling by both sides. Linamandla Mbangi of FC United gave a stand-out performance initiating strong driving moves from the centre of the field and controlling the back line.","html":"The second half had some fine moments with skilful ball-handling by both sides. Linamandla Mbangi of FC United gave a stand-out performance initiating strong driving moves from the centre of the field and controlling the back line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, with no goals scored in the second half, FC United came out victorious and collected maximum points.","html":"However, with no goals scored in the second half, FC United came out victorious and collected maximum points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
